# shokenuse

A Shiny dashboard for tracking Anthropic API token usage and estimated
costs across models, projects, and sessions.

## Installation

``` r

# During local development
devtools::load_all()

# Install from GitHub (once published)
# pak::pak("mjfrigaard/shokenuse")
```

## Quick start

``` r

library(shokenuse)
launch_app()
```

The dashboard opens to the **Data** tab. Load data in one of two ways:

**1. Admin API key** — fetches the last 30 days from your Anthropic
organization account.  
Enter your `sk-ant-admin...` key, give the source a Machine label
(e.g. `"org-name"`), click **Fetch Usage**, then **Add to Dashboard**.
Repeat with a different key to load data from another organization.

**2. Upload CSV** — paste in a usage export from the Anthropic Console
or another tool.  
Download an R or shell conversion script from the Data tab to export
your local `~/.claude/projects/` session logs first.

## Dashboard tabs

| Tab | Description |
|----|----|
| **Data** | Load data via Admin API key or CSV upload; download local conversion scripts |
| **Overview** | Daily token volume (stacked bar), five metric value boxes, date / machine / source filters |
| **By Model** | Token volume and cost by Claude model; usage trends over time |
| **By Project** | Top 20 projects by total tokens and estimated cost |
| **Sessions** | Per-session cost and token breakdown with outlier highlighting; CSV export |
| **Pricing** | Per-model pricing table used for cost estimates; link to Anthropic’s live rates |

## Utility functions

The `util_*` functions work independently of the dashboard for scripted
analysis:

``` r

# Read local Claude Code session logs
usage <- util_read_claude_code("~/.claude/projects", machine = "macOS")

# Parse a CSV export
csv   <- util_read_usage_csv("export.csv", machine = "macOS")

# Combine multiple sources
all   <- util_combine_usage(usage, csv)

# Add cost estimates
all   <- util_add_cost(all)

# Summarise by any column
util_summarise_usage(all, by = "model")
util_summarise_usage(all, by = c("date", "source"))

# Session-level breakdown with outlier flags
util_summarise_sessions(all)
```

## Fetch from the Admin API directly

``` r

# Reads ANTHROPIC_ADMIN_KEY from the environment
usage <- util_fetch_usage(
  starting_at  = "2025-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  ending_at    = "2025-01-31T23:59:59Z",
  bucket_width = "1d",
  group_by     = "model"
)
```

See
[`vignette("api-usage")`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/articles/api-usage.md)
for the full Admin API reference.

## Logging

``` r

util_log_threshold("DEBUG")  # "INFO" | "WARN" | "ERROR" | "DEBUG"
launch_app()
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`app_server()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/app_server.md)
  : Primary application server
- [`app_ui()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/app_ui.md)
  : Primary application UI
- [`hello()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/hello.md)
  : Hello, World!
- [`launch_app()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/launch_app.md)
  : Launch the shokenuse Shiny dashboard
- [`mod_api_server()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/mod_api_server.md)
  : API Data tab module server
- [`mod_api_ui()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/mod_api_ui.md)
  : API Data tab module UI
- [`mod_data_server()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/mod_data_server.md)
  : Data tab module server
- [`mod_data_ui()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/mod_data_ui.md)
  : Data tab module UI (landing page)
- [`mod_model_server()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/mod_model_server.md)
  : By Model tab module server
- [`mod_model_ui()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/mod_model_ui.md)
  : By Model tab module UI
- [`mod_overview_server()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/mod_overview_server.md)
  : Overview tab module server
- [`mod_overview_ui()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/mod_overview_ui.md)
  : Overview tab module UI
- [`mod_pricing_server()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/mod_pricing_server.md)
  : Pricing tab module server
- [`mod_pricing_ui()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/mod_pricing_ui.md)
  : Pricing tab module UI
- [`mod_project_server()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/mod_project_server.md)
  : By Project tab module server
- [`mod_project_ui()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/mod_project_ui.md)
  : By Project tab module UI
- [`mod_sessions_server()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/mod_sessions_server.md)
  : Sessions tab module server
- [`mod_sessions_ui()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/mod_sessions_ui.md)
  : Sessions tab module UI
- [`mod_upload_server()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/mod_upload_server.md)
  : Upload Data tab module server
- [`mod_upload_ui()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/mod_upload_ui.md)
  : Upload Data tab module UI
- [`util_add_cost()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/util_add_cost.md)
  : Add estimated cost column to a usage tibble
- [`util_combine_usage()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/util_combine_usage.md)
  : Combine usage data frames from multiple sources
- [`util_empty_usage_tbl()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/util_empty_usage_tbl.md)
  : Return an empty usage tibble with the canonical schema
- [`util_fetch_cost()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/util_fetch_cost.md)
  : Fetch cost data from the Anthropic Admin API
- [`util_fetch_usage()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/util_fetch_usage.md)
  : Fetch token usage from the Anthropic Admin API
- [`util_log_threshold()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/util_log_threshold.md)
  : Set the logging threshold for shokenuse
- [`util_model_pricing()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/util_model_pricing.md)
  : Anthropic model pricing (USD per million tokens)
- [`util_read_claude_code()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/util_read_claude_code.md)
  : Read token usage from Claude Code JSONL files
- [`util_read_usage_csv()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/util_read_usage_csv.md)
  : Read a manually exported usage CSV
- [`util_summarise_sessions()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/util_summarise_sessions.md)
  : Summarise token usage by session
- [`util_summarise_usage()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shokenuse/reference/util_summarise_usage.md)
  : Summarise usage by grouping variables
